series_metadata.series_description: This is a daily activity report signed by compliance officers detailing activities and expenses. It includes information about types of activity, location of compliance officer, action taken and explanation of expenses. It is used to legally verify a compliance officers activity. (fna PM-217)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: From 2003 through 2005 paper records are retained in storage in retention boxes ; Electronic: Beginning in 2005, Compliance Officers Daily Reports are entered electronically into Ohio Liquor Law Enforcement (OLLE) computer data base. OLLE computer data base is maintained by Ohio Department of Public Safety
